title: Add unified dashboard modules
summary: Add data contracts for projects, agent health, costs, experiments, tasks, alerts, infrastructure, queues, and activity feed.
acceptanceCriteria: Implements the workspace/project runtime specification without making Hermes own domain databases
Keeps project state isolated by project id or project definition path
Provides dry-run or inspectable output for risky runtime or restore behavior
Includes focused tests or a documented verification path
reviewNotes: Implemented as part of Hermes OS Workspace & Project Runtime MVP: project definitions, registry, switch/start/status, memory, snapshots, agent traces, infrastructure/vector registry, unified dashboard contracts, CLI wrappers, and integration tests.
